task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Ocean Bathymetry' map is installed and set as the default map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences window (Edit -> Preferences -> Map) showing 'Ocean Bathymetry' selected as the map, or the main GPredict UI displaying the custom plain blue map background.

task_completion.description: Verify that grid lines are disabled for the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an unchecked 'Draw grid' or similar grid line option in the GPredict Map Preferences, or observe the main map view to ensure no latitude/longitude grid lines are visible over the map.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Galapagos_CDRS' ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit ground station' or 'Ground Stations' preference window showing a station named 'Galapagos_CDRS' with Latitude: 0.7420 S (or -0.7420), Longitude: 90.3139 W (or -90.3139), and Altitude: 10m.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Galapagos_CDRS' is set as the default ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Galapagos_CDRS' marked as the default in the Ground Stations preferences (often indicated by a checkmark, bold text, or a 'Default' label), or see it set as the active station in the main UI.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a tracking module named 'Argos_Network'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module window, dock, or tab in the GPredict main interface titled 'Argos_Network'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct 6 Argos satellites are added to the 'Argos_Network' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Argos_Network' module's list of tracked satellites (either in the module configuration window or the active tracking list) to ensure it contains exactly: NOAA 15, NOAA 18, NOAA 19, METOP-B, METOP-C, and SARAL.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings and module.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual GPredict application interface (Preferences dialogs, Module configuration windows, main map UI) rather than just text editors modifying config files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the expected answers into a text editor or terminal to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The satellite names, ground station details, and map names must appear within standard GPredict UI elements (lists, dropdowns, tables), not in a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the custom map is genuinely loaded into GPredict.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map should appear within the GPredict application window with standard GPredict overlays (like satellite footprints or the terminator line), not just opened in an image viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Map Name: 'Ocean Bathymetry'. Ground Station: 'Galapagos_CDRS' at Latitude -0.742 (0.7420 S), Longitude -90.3139 (90.3139 W), Altitude 10m. Required Satellites in 'Argos_Network' module: NOAA 15 (NORAD 25338), NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-B (NORAD 38771), METOP-C (NORAD 43689), SARAL (NORAD 39086).
